final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: illustration-art
Asset type: editorial illustration, wall art print
Primary request: watercolor painting of Provence lavender fields in a European village
Scene/backdrop: French countryside, rolling lavender fields stretching to distant hills, winding gravel path, tall cypress trees lining the road, ancient stone mill with orange roof on hillside
Subject: elderly farmer wearing straw hat working in lavender field, wooden wheelbarrow filled with lavender bundles in foreground
Style/medium: transparent watercolor technique, light and airy brushstrokes, luminous color washes, illustration style
Composition/framing: wide landscape composition, foreground subject with depth to distant hills, pastoral scene
Lighting/mood: bright sunny day, warm and romantic French pastoral atmosphere, healing and cozy mood
Color palette: translucent purple lavender, azure blue sky, lush greens, warm orange roof accents, fluffy white clouds, harmonious color harmony
Materials/textures: wet-on-wet watercolor washes, visible paper texture, delicate brushwork, soft color gradients
Constraints: maintain watercolor transparency and lightness, preserve the romantic Provence aesthetic
Avoid: photorealistic rendering, heavy opaque colors, digital-looking smooth gradients, cluttered composition
